## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Changes

- [ ] Feature / enhancement
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Test addition or update

## Testing

Describe how you tested the change. Include commands run and relevant output.

```bash
pytest backend/tests/ -v
```

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check backend/` passes
- [ ] `mypy backend/app/` passes (or new errors are justified)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Documentation updated if the API or behaviour changed
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new environment variables were added
